name: davepi-plugin-magic-link
description: Passwordless email magic-link login for dAvePi. Mounts /auth/magic-link/{request,verify,invite} routes, stores only SHA-256 token hashes in a TTL-indexed collection, sends links via the framework mailer, and issues the framework's standard JWT on verify. Generic invite flow carries app-defined metadata guarded by a host-registered authoriser.
